entries.name: abs
entries.description: Returns the magnitude of value, always non-negative.

entries.name: ceil
entries.summary: Round up to the nearest integer.
entries.description: Returns the smallest integer greater than or equal to value.

entries.name: floor
entries.summary: Round down to the nearest integer.
entries.description: Returns the largest integer less than or equal to value.

entries.name: round
entries.description: Returns value rounded to the nearest integer using banker's rounding.

entries.name: sign
entries.description: Returns -1 if value is negative, 1 otherwise.

entries.name: negative
entries.description: Returns the value with its sign flipped (-value).

entries.name: sqrt
entries.description: Returns the non-negative square root of value.

entries.name: pow
entries.description: Returns value raised to the given power. Equivalent to value ^ power.

entries.name: exp
entries.summary: Euler's number raised to a power.
entries.description: Returns e^power, where e is Euler's number (~2.71828).

entries.name: log
entries.description: Returns the natural logarithm (base e) of value.

entries.name: min
entries.description: Returns the smaller of a and b.

entries.name: max
entries.description: Returns the larger of a and b.

entries.name: clamp
entries.summary: Clamp value between min and max.
entries.description: Returns value, bounded by min and max. If value < min returns min; if value > max returns max.

entries.name: clamp01
entries.description: Returns value, bounded between 0 and 1 inclusive.

entries.name: lerp
entries.description: Returns a value interpolated linearly between a and b by t. When t = 0 returns a; when t = 1 returns b.

entries.name: sin
entries.summary: Sine of an angle in radians.
entries.description: Returns the sine of the given angle, expressed in radians.

entries.name: cos
entries.summary: Cosine of an angle in radians.
entries.description: Returns the cosine of the given angle, expressed in radians.

entries.name: tan
entries.summary: Tangent of an angle in radians.
entries.description: Returns the tangent of the given angle, expressed in radians.

entries.name: asin
entries.description: Returns the angle (in radians) whose sine is value.

entries.name: acos
entries.description: Returns the angle (in radians) whose cosine is value.

entries.name: atan
entries.description: Returns the angle (in radians) whose tangent is value.

entries.name: random
entries.description: Returns a random float in the range [0, 1).

entries.name: rand
entries.description: Returns a random integer in the range [0, maxExclusive).

entries.name: randf
entries.description: Returns a random float in the range [0, maxExclusive).

entries.name: let
entries.description: Introduces a local variable, scoped to the formula. Local variables don't appear in the inputs panel and can be reassigned.

entries.name: if / else
entries.description: Executes the first block when condition is non-zero (true); otherwise executes the optional else block. Else blocks may chain via 'else if'.

entries.name: true / false
entries.description: Boolean values, which evaluate to 1 (true) or 0 (false) in numeric contexts.

entries.name: return
entries.description: Stops formula execution and returns the given expression's value.

entries.signature: a + b   a - b   a * b   a / b
entries.description: Standard arithmetic. Division by zero produces infinity / NaN per IEEE-754.

entries.name: % (modulo)
entries.summary: Remainder of a divided by b.
entries.description: Returns the floating-point remainder of a / b. Sign follows a.

entries.name: ^ (power)
entries.summary: Raise a to the power b.
entries.description: Equivalent to pow(a, b).

entries.name: Comparison
entries.signature: a == b   a != b   a < b   a <= b   a > b   a >= b
entries.description: Comparison operators return 1 (true) or 0 (false).

entries.name: Logical
entries.description: && is logical AND, || is logical OR, ! is logical NOT. Operands are treated as truthy when non-zero.

entries.name: Ternary
entries.description: Evaluates condition; returns whenTrue if it is non-zero, otherwise whenFalse.

entries.name: Assignment
entries.signature: x = v   x += v   x -= v   x *= v   x /= v
entries.description: Assigns the right-hand value to the named variable. Compound forms read-modify-write the existing value.
